name: active-flow push wrapper rejects a flow name that is not registered in the workflow state machine
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/workflow/active-flow-push.sh" --flow no-such-flow --pid 1 --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'unknown_flow=no-such-flow' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
